title: Using Monday as contact database (10k item limit is too small)
excerpt:
Is there a way around the 10,000 item limit? My contact database grows by up to 10k per month and I’m creating new boards constantly making my database more and more difficult to manage. 
Do any of you know a work around…

posts.author: landboss (Bart Waldon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way around the 10,000 item limit? My contact database grows by up to 10k per month and I’m creating new boards constantly making my database more and more difficult to manage.

Do any of you know a work around for this?

posts.author: Adam_Integration (Adam Reavill)
posts.cookedHtml:
